mapper.select: SELECT id, date, title, summary, status, created_at FROM briefing ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT b.id, b.date, b.title, b.summary, b.status, b.created_at, i.id AS item_id, i.briefing_id, i.title AS item_title, i.url, i.source, i.original_content, i.ai_summary, i.importance_score, i.created_at AS item_created_at FROM briefing b LEFT JOIN briefing_item i ON i.briefing_id = b.id WHERE b.id = #{id}
SELECT id, date, title, summary, status, created_at FROM briefing WHERE date = #{date}

SELECT b.id, b.date, b.title, b.summary, b.status, b.created_at, i.id AS item_id, i.briefing_id, i.title AS item_title, i.url, i.source, i.original_content, i.ai_summary, i.importance_score, i.created_at AS item_created_at FROM briefing b LEFT JOIN briefing_item i ON i.briefing_id = b.id WHERE b.date = #{date}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO briefing (date, title, summary, status) VALUES (#{date}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE briefing SET title=#{title}, summary=#{summary}, status=#{status} WHERE id=#{id}
